things.name: Petra (The Rose City)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Nabataean city - one of the New Seven Wonders of the World

things.name: Amman Citadel (Jabal al-Qal'a)
things.description: Hilltop archaeological complex with ruins from the Bronze Age to the Islamic era and panoramic views

things.name: Roman Theatre
things.description: Well-preserved 2nd-century Roman amphitheatre in the heart of Amman seating 6,000

things.name: Jordan Museum
things.description: Jordan's foremost museum with the Dead Sea Scrolls and 9,000-year-old Ain Ghazal statues

things.name: Dead Sea
things.description: Float effortlessly in the world's saltiest sea - the lowest point on Earth at -430m

things.name: Wadi Rum
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage desert of red sandstone mountains and Lawrence of Arabia landscapes

things.name: Rainbow Street & Jabal Amman
things.description: Cosmopolitan neighbourhood with boutiques, art galleries, coffee shops and meze restaurants

things.name: Jerash Roman City
things.description: One of the best-preserved Roman cities in the world, only 50km north of Amman

things.name: Ajloun Castle
things.description: 12th-century Ayyubid castle built by Saladin's general to defend against Crusader attack

things.name: King Abdullah I Mosque
things.description: Blue-domed mosque with space for 3,000 worshippers and museum of Islamic art
